{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = false Emperor
| introduced = Of Kings and Killers
}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The false Emperor is an imitation being raised by the [[Imperialists]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c1">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The false Emperor is identified as Imperial Steward Calder Marten{{!}}Calder Marten.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c1" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
